period.timezone_note: Weekly automation run on 2026-07-04 KST; window starts after the previous successful last_processed_until.

experiment_dispositions.reason: Quest Home entrypoint visual consumer confirmed in the private channels list
Nitro gift plan row reads the experiment and exposes quantity selection when enabled
same bulk Nitro gift quantity consumer confirmed for the modified row
existing soundboard height interpretation corrected and applied to the new modified row
soundboard grid reads the experiment and inserts a frequently-used section when enabled
current Nitro tab consumer still confirms the existing personalized-offer interpretation

highlighted_experiments.summary: Quest Home 진입 버튼에 캠페인용 강조 배경을 임시로 적용하는 실험입니다.
highlighted_experiments.evidence_notes: Private channels list reads the experiment and applies a custom Quest Home hover gradient when entrypoint data includes a gradient preset.

highlighted_experiments.summary: Nitro 선물 결제에서 같은 선물을 여러 개 고르는 수량 선택 UI를 시험합니다.
highlighted_experiments.evidence_notes: Premium gift plan selection reads the experiment, shows a quantity stepper for selected Tier 2 gifts, and checkout can pass quantity.

highlighted_experiments.summary: 사운드보드에 자주 쓴 소리 섹션을 추가하는 실험입니다.
highlighted_experiments.evidence_notes: Soundboard grid reads recent sound usage, excludes favorites, and inserts a frequently-used section when enabled.

highlighted_experiments.summary: 사운드보드 선택기 팝아웃을 100px 더 높게 보여주는 실험입니다.
highlighted_experiments.evidence_notes: Current config is enabled-only; the popout height path adds 100 px rather than reading an extraHeightPx config key.

highlighted_experiments.summary: Nitro 탭의 맞춤 혜택 배지 모양과 안내 방식을 바꾸는 실험입니다.
highlighted_experiments.evidence_notes: NitroTabButton still reads badgeStyle and surface through useConfig in the current bundle.

non_experiment_changes.summary: Premium billing adds a past-due restore path for retrying payment or adding a new payment method.
non_experiment_changes.source_context: API rows add /billing/premium/past-due and strings add “Restore Subscription” plus “Your subscription is past due. Retry payment or add a new payment method to restore it.”

non_experiment_changes.summary: Family Center copy now more explicitly covers guardian connection deadlines, QR/link sharing, spending caps, purchase/gift summaries, and scheduled downtime.
non_experiment_changes.source_context: Korean string changes add guardian connection calls to action, spending limit warnings, purchase and gift summaries, and downtime copy.

non_experiment_changes.summary: Quest and Orbs copy points to special quests, Orbs earned from quests, and Nitro-only Orbs redemption paths.
non_experiment_changes.source_context: String rows include “Special Quests”, “Discord 퀘스트를 완료하여 Orbs 획득하기”, Nitro-only Orbs redemption, and “Finish all bounties for +{orbAmount, number} Orbs to unlock”.

non_experiment_changes.summary: Server tags and Boost-unlocked custom server themes continue to surface in user-facing copy.
non_experiment_changes.source_context: Strings describe custom server tags visible beside member names, server profile/application exposure, and Boost-unlocked custom themes.

non_experiment_changes.summary: Voice channel text chat gets explicit toggle copy.
non_experiment_changes.source_context: Strings add “음성 채널 채팅 토글” and a description for toggling the text chat panel of the currently connected voice channel.

non_experiment_changes.summary: Game/activity presence copy adds active-time labels and match/game event labels.
non_experiment_changes.source_context: Strings include Active weekdays/weekends/every day, Buzzing morning/evening labels, Established date, and game/match event labels.
